meta.title: Why SpaceX reusing a rocket is a really big deal! Behind the scenes of the first reflown rocket!
meta.description:
SpaceX reused the first stage of their Falcon 9 rocket for the first time ever! Why is this a big deal? Well I drove 21 hours down to Kennedy Space Center to find out!

Help support this and other Everyday Astronaut content by visiting http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Music by Everyday Astronaut - http://soundcloud.com/everydayastronaut

Learn HOW SpaceX lands rockets and why they don't use parachutes with this video - https://youtu.be/TfNrHXwQ3SM
